_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in applying technical delivery capabilities.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requirements with long-term maintainability, scalability, and operational sustainability.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-004 (DA, cosine: 0.532), OP-S-004 (OP, cosine: 0.528).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.7/10 (raw 0.665). Shared vocabulary: [delivery, technical]. DCWF-only terms [applying, capabilities, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, balance, design, immediate, implementations, long] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.927, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.069 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Skill in applying technical delivery capabilities." and "Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requ" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.610 < STS 0.665 (gap -0.055). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [applying, capabilities, skill] and [ability, balance, design] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [delivery, technical]. DCWF-only: [applying, capabilities, skill]. WIDAI-only: [ability, balance, design, immediate, implementations, long].
